BoilerPin.Label: Boiler Pin
BoilerPin.Description: The name of the pin that controls the boiler on/off relay.

SPIPort.Label: SPI Port
SPIPort.Description: The name of the SPI port the temperature sensor is attached to.

TempSampleRate.Label: Temperature Sample Rate
TempSampleRate.Description: How often the UI reads the current temperature

PIDFrequency.Label: PID Frequency
PIDFrequency.Description: How often the PID updates the boiler in reaction to a change in temperature

PIDAutostart.Label: PID Auto-start
PIDAutostart.Description: Should the PID start running automatically when the Gesha service start up?

MessageTargetTempSetSuccess: The temperature target was set to ${target} °${temperatureUnit}
MessageTargetTempSetFailure: There was a problem setting a new target temperature
MessageStartPidFailure: There was a problem starting the PID
MessageStopPidFailure: There was a problem stopping the PID
